reference: Hi Doctor, I took a hysterosalpingography and the results indicate that my right fallopian tube is narrow and its mucosa is irregular. It exhibits scanty peritoneal spill, while the other tube has a normal caliber and exhibits normal and free peritoneal spill. Does this mean I cannot conceive?
text: Hi, Doctor. I took a hysterosalpingography, and the results indicate that my right fallopian tube is narrow and its mucosa is irregular. It exhibits scanty peritoneal spill, while the other tube has a normal caliber and exhibits normal and free peritoneal spill. Does this mean I cannot conceive?
